title: Create Installed Lifecycle Management review remediation execution plan
outOfScope: 生产代码、测试、CI、Makefile、Schema、发布资产和现有历史计划内容
实际创建、推送、审查、合并或关闭后续 Installed Lifecycle 工单

sources.reason: User-provided Installed Lifecycle Management design and requirements.
AI Cockpit lifecycle and evidence requirements.
Execution plan retention and index rules.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: 评审结论能追溯到 Installed Lifecycle 设计材料和仓库治理规则
scenarioCoverage.reason: 计划必须引用用户材料、Glossary、Cockpit README 和计划索引规则。

scenarioCoverage.scenario: 每个工单都明确完整闭环并在完成前阻止进入下一工单
scenarioCoverage.reason: 计划必须重复可执行的 12 步 Work Item 生命周期和 ready-for-next 门。

scenarioCoverage.scenario: 用户授权与未来实际 PR/合并/发布/清理证据分离
evidence: user request explicitly grants the complete workflow scope
scenarioCoverage.reason: 计划必须记录已获授权，但禁止预填未来事件的事实证据。

scenarioCoverage.scenario: 最后工单清理执行计划文档且保留审计历史
scenarioCoverage.reason: 计划最后一项必须是文档清理，并保留 Contract、Summary、PR 和发布证据。

riskAssessment.reason: The deliverable is a planning document; implementation evidence for each future Work Item is intentionally deferred to those Work Items.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized creating the execution plan and the complete per-Work-Item lifecycle, including PR and branch cleanup.

preReviewWarnings: Plan must distinguish user authorization from evidence that can only be recorded after real PR, merge, release, digest, and branch-cleanup events.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The review summary reflects the supplied Installed Lifecycle Management material and repository boundaries.

The plan contains a serial Work Item list covering Install Manifest, Ownership, Update, Rollback, Disable/Enable, Uninstall, evidence, CLI, Cockpit, documentation, cross-version tests, and final plan cleanup.

Every Work Item explicitly includes the full lifecycle: latest remote base, dedicated branch, Contract/Preflight, scoped implementation, verification, Summary/ai-finish, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default-branch synchronization.
The plan states the user's authorization and identifies facts that must remain evidence-based.
The last Work Item is execution-plan document cleanup and preserves audit evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The supplied Installed Lifecycle Management design describes many lifecycle capabilities but does not yet provide a review summary, serial Work Item decomposition, or an explicit PR-and-branch-cleanup loop.
constraints: Do not implement production behavior in this Work Item.
Keep existing historical plans and audit evidence intact.
Treat the user's granted scope as the boundary for this plan, not as proof that future PR, release, digest, or merge events occurred.
intent.rationale: A single auditable plan makes the lifecycle work executable in dependency order and prevents moving to the next Work Item before the current one is fully closed.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: 用户明确授权创建本执行计划，并授权后续工单按完整流程执行，包括专用分支、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、本地和远端分支清理；未来实际结果仍须以证据为准。

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
